title: Vietnamese Meat Bowl
description: A flavorful Vietnamese-inspired meal consisting of marinated meat, herbs, and noodles served in a bowl.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together fish sauce, soy sauce, and hoisin sauce to make the marinade.
2. Add the sliced pork to the marinade and mix well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Cook the Vietnamese rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
4. Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add the sliced red onion and cook until lightly browned.
5. Add the sliced red chili peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Remove the pork from the marinade and add it to the skillet. Cook until browned and cooked through.
7. To assemble the bowls, place a portion of noodles in the bottom of a bowl, followed by the cooked pork and vegetables.
8. Sprinkle chopped cilantro on top of the pork and serve immediately.
9. Serve with a squeeze of lime juice and additional fish sauce, soy sauce, or hoisin sauce if desired.
